launches.name: Eagle Ridge Main Launch
launches.notes: Primary launch. Requires 12–28 km/h SW wind. Clear of trees on all sides.

launches.name: North Bowl High Launch
launches.notes: Alternative NW window. Shorter soarable day. Good for morning flights.

landings.name: Valley LZ — Main Field
landings.notes: Primary LZ. Flat, 200m diameter. Check for afternoon thermal dust devils.

features.name: Eagle Ridge Main
features.description: Primary SW-facing ridge producing consistent ridge lift at 12–28 km/h SW winds.

features.name: South Bowl
features.description: Concave south-facing bowl that concentrates afternoon thermals.

features.name: West Lee Sink Zone
features.description: Mechanical turbulence in the lee of Pine Tree Line. Avoid when W > 20 km/h.

thermal_zones.name: South Bowl Thermal
thermal_zones.notes: South-facing bowl, sheltered. Triggers when spread > 8°C.

ridge_corridors.name: Eagle Ridge Main Corridor
ridge_corridors.notes: SW-facing primary ridge. Best lift at 190–240°, 12–28 km/h.

caution_zones.title: West Lee Sink — Rotor Risk
caution_zones.description: Mechanical turbulence in the lee of Pine Tree Line. Active when westerly > 20 km/h.

climb_hotspots.name: South Bowl Primary Trigger
climb_hotspots.notes: Most consistent climb entry in South Bowl.

recommendations.title: Optimal Window: 11:00–14:00 UTC
recommendations.description: Thermal index peaks at 0.68 by 12:00 UTC. SW 15 km/h ideal for Eagle Ridge Main. South Bowl trigger active.
evidence_summary: Wind 210° at 15 km/h — within optimal window
12 historical tracks confirm South Bowl active in this window

recommendations.title: South Bowl — Primary Thermal Zone
recommendations.description: High-confidence thermal zone. Start thermalling at NE edge, work upwind to gain height before transitioning.
evidence_summary: Terrain: south-facing bowl concentrates surface heating
Flight history: avg 2.1 m/s climb over 12 tracks

recommendations.title: Avoid West Lee Sink after 15:00
recommendations.description: Sea breeze intensification predicted after 15:00 UTC increases rotor risk in the Pine Tree Line lee.
evidence_summary: Weather: wind increases to 24 km/h by 16:00
Terrain: 30m tree obstacle creates mechanical turbulence
Risk agent: conflict with terrain agent — conservative arbitration applied

claims.claim_text: Optimal launch window 11:00–14:00 UTC based on thermal index 0.68 and wind 15 km/h SW
High wind advisory: gusts may exceed 35 km/h after 16:00 UTC
Eagle Ridge Main supports ridge lift at current wind 210° / 15 km/h
West Lee Sink Zone: rotor conditions when westerly component > 20 km/h
Cloud cover 35%, cumulus type, base 2100m — moderate thermal development
South Bowl triggers when spread > 8°C — confirmed by site expert
12 historical flights show avg 2.1 m/s climb at South Bowl 35.487°N 118.188°W
Conflict detected: weather agent (caution) vs terrain agent (neutral) over West Lee Sink

uncertainty_summary: Moderate confidence overall (avg 0.72). Primary uncertainty: afternoon sea breeze timing (±1h) and cloud overdevelopment threshold. Flight history cluster confidence limited by 12 tracks; more data will improve thermal zone precision.
advisory_disclaimer: ADVISORY ONLY — NOT FOR OPERATIONAL USE. This overlay is generated by an experimental multi-agent research system. It does not replace a qualified flight briefing, site check, or instructor assessment. Conditions change rapidly. Always exercise independent pilot judgment and fly within your personal limits.
